zh.Stanton, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁
zh.of, Stanton, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁
zh.Stanton Saint Quintin, Wiltshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁
zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend John Woodbridge於大約1525年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁時，他的父親Reverend John Woodbridge34歲，母親Grace Stalebras24歲。他於大約1553年與Elizabeth Kingsman在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在英國維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reverend John Woodbridge于大约1525年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁时，他的父亲Reverend John Woodbridge34岁，母亲Grace Stalebras24岁。他于大约1553年与Elizabeth Kingsman在英国英格兰維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在英国維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodbridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Woodbridge in Suffolk or Dorset, both named from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + brycg ‘bridge’ (i.e. a bridge made of timber or one near a wood), or a topographic name denoting a person who lived by a wooden bridge or a bridge in or near a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + brigge ‘bridge’ (Old English wudu + brycg).
History: John Woodbridge (1613–95), emigrated in 1634 from Stanton in Wiltshire, England, to Newbury, MA, where he was pastor and magistrate.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend John Woodbridge was born about 1525, in Stanton Saint Quintin, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reverend John Woodbridge, was 34 and his mother, Grace Stalebras, was 24. He married Elizabeth Kingsman about 1553, in Stanton Saint Quintin, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reverend John Woodbridge est né environ 1525, à Stanton Saint Quintin, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reverend John Woodbridge, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Grace Stalebras, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Kingsman environ 1553, à Stanton Saint Quintin, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé à Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Reverend John Woodbridgeが約1525年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアスタントン サイント クインティンで生まれた時，父Reverend John Woodbridgeは34歳，母Grace Stalebrasは24歳であった。約1553年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアスタントン サイント クインティンでElizabeth Kingsmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスウィルトシュアイアスタントン スト クインティンで死去した。

ko.of, Stanton, Wiltshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스탠턴 세인트 퀸틴
ko.Stanton Saint Quintin, Wiltshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스탠턴 세인트 퀸틴
ko.lifeSummary: Reverend John Woodbridge(이)가 대략 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스탠턴 세인트 퀸틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reverend John Woodbridge(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Stalebras(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1553년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스탠턴 세인트 퀸틴에서 Elizabeth Kingsman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 윌츠히르 스탠턴 스트 퀸틴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend John Woodbridge родился около 1525 г. в местности стантон сеинт куинтинь, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reverend John Woodbridge было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Grace Stalebras, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Kingsman около 1553 г. в местности стантон сеинт куинтинь, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в местности стантон ст куинтинь, уилцхир, Англия.
